mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `purchase_inbound` (purchase_id, bill_no, warehouse_id, status, remark, create_time) VALUES (#{purchaseId}, #{billNo}, #{warehouseId}, #{status}, #{remark}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT i.*, p.bill_no AS purchase_bill_no, p.supplier_id FROM `purchase_inbound` i JOIN `purchase` p ON i.purchase_id = p.id WHERE i.id = #{id}
SELECT i.*, p.bill_no AS purchase_bill_no, p.supplier_id FROM `purchase_inbound` i JOIN `purchase` p ON i.purchase_id = p.id WHERE i.purchase_id = #{purchaseId}

SELECT i.*, p.bill_no AS purchase_bill_no, p.supplier_id FROM `purchase_inbound` i JOIN `purchase` p ON i.purchase_id = p.id
AND i.bill_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{billNo}, '%') AND i.status = #{status} AND p.bill_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{purchaseBillNo}, '%')
ORDER BY i.id DESC
